title: Bridge Essay: Beyond the veil of duality-topographic reorganization model of meditation.
concept: Emptiness — dissolution of self, ego, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, ego, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Beyond the veil of duality-topographic reorganization model of meditation.** - Neuroscience of consciousness (2022). DOI: 10.1093/nc/niac013. PMID: 36237370. Meditation can exert a profound impact on our mental life, with proficient practitioners often reporting an experience free of boundaries between a separate self and the environment, suggesting an explicit experience of "nondual awareness." What are the neural correlates of such experiences and how do they relate to the idea of nondual awareness itself?
